card.name: Purifier Colossus
card.text: Double strike Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Vengeful Psionic
card.text: Vigilance Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Swarm Ultralisk
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Dominion Thor
card.text: Reach Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Brood Devourer
card.text: Flying Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Merc Commander
card.text: Vigilance This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if mana from a Mineral source was spent to cast it. Whenever you sacrifice a Mineral, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Daelaam Templar
card.text: This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Khala — {T}, Remove a counter from among Protoss permanents you control: Remove up to three counters from target creature. Tap it. That creature doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.

card.name: Nerazim Templar
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {2}. If you do, proliferate.

card.name: Alarak, Tal'Darim Highlord
card.text: First strike This creature has indestructible as long as you control an Army. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may remove a counter from any number of non-Army creatures you control. If you do, amass Protoss X,where X is the the number of counters removed this way.

card.name: Tal'Darim Archon
card.text: Emerge from Protoss {4}{W}{B} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a Protoss and paying the emerge cost reduced by that Protoss's mana value.) Menace Whenever a creature you control dies, if it had +1/+1 counters on it, put them on target creature you control.

card.name: Primal Viper
card.text: Flying {2}{R}{G}, {T}: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Brood Defiler
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, each opponent loses 1 life and mills a card.

card.name: Mineral SCDS
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add {C}.

card.name: Vespene SCDS
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Vespene SCDS
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Vespene SCDS
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Psionic Grip
card.text: Psionic Grip deals 2 damage to target creature you don't control. You gain life equal to the damage dealt this way. Infusion {4}{B}{B}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Feedback Maelstrom
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Stimpack Injection
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Swarm Ravager
card.text: Trample When this creature dies, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens.

card.name: Burrowed Charge
card.text: Target creature you control deals its power to target creature you don't control, then mine (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Brood Hydralisk
card.text: Reach {8}: Up to two creatures get +3/+3 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Psionic Blades
card.text: Whenever the equipped creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Equip {1}

card.name: Crushing Grip
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature. Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If you sacrificed a creature, target creature gets -6/-6 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Mineral Field
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}: Mine. This ability costs {2} less to activate if this land entered this turn. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Pygalisk
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1.

card.name: Daelaam Phoenix
card.text: Flying {8}: Tap up to three target creatures.

card.name: Abathur, Evolution Perfectionist
card.text: Deathtouch {T}: Add {G} or {U}. Whenever you cast a creature spell with mana value 6 or greater, copy it.

card.name: Dark Prelate Zeratul
card.text: Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This creature can't be blocked. Whenever you cast a spell, proliferate.

card.name: Hierarch Artanis
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This enters with a shield counter on it. Permanents you control have "Whenever a counter is placed on this permanent, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn."

card.name: Kerrigan, Swarm Queen
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature enters under your control, if you didn't cast it, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. Whenever you sacrifice a creature, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Swarm Hatchery
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Brood Larva
card.text: Defender Creature spells you cast with mana value 6 or greater cost {2} less to cast.

card.name: Prophecy of Salvation
card.text: Suspend 4—{W}{W} Return all creature cards from each graveyard to the battlefield under their owner's control. Creatures you control that entered this way enter with an additional +1/+1 counter on them.

card.name: Prophecy of Destruction
card.text: Suspend 4—{B}{B} Destroy all creatures and legendary nonland, noncreature permanents. Creatures dying this way don't cause abilities to trigger.

card.name: Tassadar, Heretical Saviour
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, proliferate. [0]: Creatures you don't control get -1/-0 until your next turn. [-2]: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put two into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. [-4]: Put up to two target creatures on top of their owner's library.

card.name: Captain Matt Horner
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you gain life, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Dehaka of the Broken Pack
card.text: Whenever a creature you control deals noncombat damage, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. {R}{G}, Remove six +1/+1 counters from this creature: Exile target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Primal Pack Leader
card.text: Prevent all noncombat damage that would be dealt to this creature. Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell you control, that creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Primal Brawl
card.text: Whenever a creature you control deals noncombat damage, put a +1/+1 counter on it. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may have target creature you control fight target creature you don't control. If you do, tap those creatures.

card.name: Mend
card.text: Target permanent you control gains indestructible and hexproof until end of turn. Infusion {2}{G}{G}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Prophecy of Creation
card.text: Suspend 4—{R}{R} Each player exiles the top seven cards of their library. Until the end of your next turn, players may play cards they exiled this way.

card.name: Prophecy of Unity
card.text: Suspend 4—{G}{G} Each player reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a creature card. Put those creature cards onto the battlefield under their owner's control and then put all other cards revealed this way on the bottom of their owner's library in a random order, then create a token copy of your creature that entered this way.

card.name: Prophecy of Uncertanty
card.text: Suspend 4—{U}{U} Each player may cast an instant or sorcery from their graveyard not named Prophecy of Uncertanty without paying its mana cost. If you do, copy your spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. Exile those spells after they resolve.

card.name: Mining Zone
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add {C}.

card.name: Denial of Will
card.text: Khala — When you cast this spell, you may remove two counters from among Protoss permanents you control. If you do, copy this spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Akhundelar
card.text: First strike This creature enters with a shield counter on it. Whenever a creature you control without any +1/+1 counters on it deals combat damage, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Autonomous Probes
card.text: When this creature enters, if an opponent controls more lands than you, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Purifier Zealot
card.text: This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature dies, you may put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature or Protoss creature you control.

card.name: Hybrid Reaver
card.text: Trample This creature attacks each combat if able.

card.name: Drop Pods
card.text: Choose one — • Create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. • Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Backwater Miners
card.text: Vigilance Whenever a land enters under your control, create a tapped Mineral token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this: Add {C}.")

card.name: Swarm Leviathan
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each green nontoken permanent you control. Flying, trample You may cast creature spells as though they had flash. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, create four 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens.

card.name: Mutually Assured Devastation
card.text: As you cast this spell, choose an opponent to copy it. That player chooses a new target for the copy if able. Mutually Assured Devastation deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Mutually Assured Destruction
card.text: As you cast this spell, choose an opponent to copy it. That player chooses a new target for the copy if able. Destroy target creature with power 3 or greater.

card.name: Mutually Assured Demolition
card.text: As you cast this spell, choose an opponent to copy it. That player chooses a new target for the copy if able. Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Mutually Assured Decimation
card.text: As you cast this spell, choose an opponent to copy it. That player chooses a new target for the copy if able. Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Mutually Assured Disruption
card.text: As you cast this spell, choose an opponent to copy it. That player chooses a new target for the copy if able. Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Daelaam Archon
card.text: Emerge from Protoss {4}{W}{U} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a Protoss and paying the emerge cost reduced by that Protoss's mana value.) Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This creature enters with two shield counters on it. (If a permanent with a shield counter on it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Nerazim Archon
card.text: Emerge from Protoss {4}{U}{B} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a Protoss and paying the emerge cost reduced by that Protoss's mana value.) At the beginning of each upkeep, put a charge counter on this creature Khala — Remove two counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Swarm Infestor
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave an opponent's graveyard, create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token. {3}{B}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Creeper Host
card.text: This creature has hexproof as long as it's untapped. {1}{G}, {T}: Create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens.

card.name: Delta Squad Hellbat
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may pay {R}{W} and discard a card. If you do, choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile up to two target cards from a player's graveyard.

card.name: Relief Effort
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a Mineral token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this: Add {C}.") Whenever another permanent enters under your control, if mana from a Mineral was spent to cast it, you draw a card and gain 2 life.

card.name: Tal'Darim Templar
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may pay {W}{B} and sacrifice another creature. If you do, distribute X +1/+1 counters among creatures control and you gain X life where X is the power of the sacrificed creature.

card.name: First Ascendant
card.text: Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and each opponent loses 1 life. As long as this creature has eight or more +1/+1 counters on it, it has flying, ward {3}, and other permanents you control have hexproof.

card.name: Daelaam Adept
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. Khala — {U}{U}, Remove four counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Alpha Squadron Wraith
card.text: Flying, ward {1} When this creature dies, surveil 2.

card.name: Carrier has Arrived
card.text: Create three 1/1 colorless Protoss artifact creature tokens with flying. Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Daelaam Scout
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Protoss artifact creature with flying, then draw a card.

card.name: Behemoth Battlecruiser
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. If you have one or fewer cards in your hand, creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Lost Viking
card.text: Spend mana only produced by tokens to cast this creature. Flying, vigilance

card.name: Mobile Utility Lunar Excavator
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice a land: Mine twice. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Roaming Reaver
card.text: First strike At the beginning of your upkeep, put a charge counter on this creature. Khala — Remove two counters from among Protoss permanents you control: This creature gets +5/+0 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Khaydarin Amulet
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, put a charge counter on this artifact. If the creature was a Protoss, put two charge counters on this artifact instead. Remove three counters from this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Mobile Barracks
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast Terran spells or to activate the abilities of Terran permanents.

card.name: Warp Gateway
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast Protoss spells or to activate the abilities of Protoss permanents.

card.name: Feral Spawning Pool
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast Zerg spells or to activate the abilities of Zerg permanents.

card.name: Returned Dragoon
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile a nonartifact creature card from your graveyard. Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Regenerative Baneling
card.text: Lifelink Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Tal'Darim Zealot
card.text: This creature enters with a shield counter on it. Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) When this creature dies, each opponent loses life equal to its power.

card.name: Nerazim Seer
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. When this creature enters, each opponent loses X life, where X is the number of permanents you control with counters on them. You gain life equal to the life lost this way.

card.name: The Queen's Decree
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature. Search your library for two cards. Put one into your hand and the other into your graveyard. Then shuffle. If you sacrificed a creature, return up to one creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Expo Scouts
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Swarm Host
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token tapped and attacking. {1}{G}, Sacrifice another Zerg creature: Put target creature or land card from your graveyard on top of your library.

card.name: Spartan Company
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, mine twice. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.) {2}: Untap each creature you control. Spend only mana produced by token sources to activate this ability.

card.name: Raiders Reinforcements
card.text: Trample, haste When this creature enters, others creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn. Terran creatures you control get an additional +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Swarm Siegebreaker
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, it fights up to one target creature.

card.name: Deep Mining Station
card.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards. If mana from a Mineral source was spent to cast this spell, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Otherwise, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Terrazine Researcher
card.text: {T}: Add {U} or {R}. Spend this mana only to cast noncreature spells. Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a Vespene token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card, then discard a card.")

card.name: Executor Selendis
card.text: Vigilance Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Whenever one or more counters are placed on a permanent you control, you may create a 1/1 colorless Protoss artifact creature with flying.

card.name: Infested Researcher
card.text: Menace, haste This creature must be blocked if able. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, exile target creature card in that player's graveyard. Until end of turn you may cast that card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Advisor's Insight
card.text: When this enchantment enters and whenever you cast a green creature spell with mana value 6 or greater, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. When this enchantment enters and whenever you cast a blue creature spell with mana value 6 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Class Nine Ghost
card.text: Creatures with power less than this creature's power can't block it. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, if you have one or fewer cards in hand, it deals 3 damage to up to one target creature.

card.name: Biomass Assimilator
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token. Sacrifice a Zerg: Add {B}. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Tal'Darim Blood Hunter
card.text: Flash Tal'Darim Blood Hunter enters with a shield counter on it. {1}{B}, Sacrifice a Protoss creature: Each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the sacrificed creature's power.

card.name: Brood Leviathan
card.text: Flying, trample Ward—Pay 3 life. Creature tokens you control have flying. Whenever a nontoken creature dies, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens and each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Prophetic Visions
card.text: Look at the top two cards of target player's library, then put one back and the other into that player's graveyard. Infusion {U}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Mining Contract
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, mine. Then if you control twenty or more Minerals, you win the game. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Despair Manifested
card.text: As this enters, choose a creature type. As long as this creature is on the battlefield, it has all activated abilities and triggered abilities of all creature cards of the chosen type in your graveyard and is the chosen creature type in addition to its other types.

card.name: Terror of the Hive
card.text: Trample, vigilance Whenever you cast a creature spell, you may have this creature fight target creature you don't control.

card.name: Broken Horn Pack
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. Other Zerg creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Death Head Salvager
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.) Whenever another nontoken creature enters the battlefield under your control, you may pay {3}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that creature.

card.name: Ravenous Swarm
card.text: This creature can't attack or block unless you exile a card from your graveyard. (This cost is paid as attackers or blockers are declared.) Whenever an opponent casts a spell from their graveyard, this creature deals 2 damage to that player.

card.name: Moebius Mining Team
card.text: If you would mine, you may create two Mineral tokens instead. (They are artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add {C}.") {5}{R}{R}{R}: Until end of turn, if a source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player this turn, it deals double that damage to that permanent or player instead instead.

card.name: Covert Operative
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life {1}{R}, {T}, Discard a card: This creature deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Shadow Operative
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Vespene token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever an artifact enters under your control, draw a card, then discard a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Overqueen Harvester
card.text: When this creature enters, gain control of target creature, it becomes a Zerg in addition to its other types. At the beginning of your end step, if you control a permanent you don't control, surveil 2.

card.name: Wisdom of the Collective
card.text: Target player draws X cards. Infusion {X}{W}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Daelaam Praetor
card.text: Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Whenever another creature enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Daelaam Immortal
card.text: Vigilance If a source would deal damage to a permanent you control, prevent all but 1 of that damage.

card.name: Emperor Arcturus Mengsk
card.text: Menace Discard a card: Mengsk deals 1 damage to target creature. Activate only as a sorcery. At the beginning of your end step, if you have one or fewer cards in your hand, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Daelaam Illusionist
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a charge counter this for each Protoss creature you control. Khala — {1}{U}, Discard a card, Remove five counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Create a token copy of another target creature you control, except it's a blue Illusion in addition to its other types and it gains "Prevent all damage this permanent would deal."

card.name: Kaiser Ultralisk
card.text: Menace At the beginning of combat on your turn, return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to the battlefield. They gains haste. Exile them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: The Xel'Naga Keystone
card.text: Indestructible {T}, Discard a card: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. {1}, {T}, Remove a counter from among permanents you control: Create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw two cards. {3}: Untap this artifact.

card.name: Swarm Ultraling
card.text: This creature's power is equal to the number of creatures you control. Whenever this creature attacks, you may create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token.

card.name: Raptor Strain
card.text: When this enters, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. Attacking creature tokens you control get +1/+0 and have first strike.

card.name: Leaping Strike
card.text: Leaping Strike deals 5 damage to target creature. Then create X 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens, where X is equal to the amount of excess damage dealt this way.

card.name: Necessary Sacrifices
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Necessary Sacrifices deals damage to up to two target attacking creatures equal to the power of the sacrificed creature.

card.name: Ground Support
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a charge counter on this creature. Khala — {1}, Remove two counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Create a 1/1 colorless Protoss artifact creature with flying. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Escaped Specimen
Adept Praetor
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. This creature can't be blocked. Whenever this creature you control deals combat damage to a player, proliferate.

card.name: Void-Touched Colossus
card.text: Vigilance This spell costs {1} less to cast for each permanent you control with a counter on it. Khala — When this creature enters, you may remove a counter from any number of permanents you control. For each counter removed this way, draw a card.

card.name: Warp In Structure
card.text: Exile an artifact or enchantment card from your hand and put four time counters on it. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. (At the beginning of its owner's upkeep, they remove a time counter. When the last is removed, they play it without paying its mana cost. If it's a creature, it has haste.)

card.name: Shuttle Drop
card.text: Creatures you control with power or toughness 2 or less can't be blocked.

card.name: Brood Overlord
card.text: Flying, defender At the beginning of your end step, surveil 1. If a creature you controlled died this turn, surveil 1, then draw a card instead.

card.name: Marine Patrol
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: Eternal Dragoon
card.text: Khala — As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove three counters from among Protoss permanents you control or pay {3}. Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Whenever this creature attacks, you may remove a counter from it. If you do, it gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Lockdown Specialist
card.text: Ward {1} When this creature enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Aiur Veteran
card.text: Double strike Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Praetor Zealot
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may put two +1/+1 counters on another target creature you control.

card.name: Boundless Fury
card.text: Target creature you control gains double strike until end of turn. If it has a +1/+1 counter on it, draw a card.

card.name: Daelaam Mentor
card.text: Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Salvage Crew
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent controls more lands than you, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Infestation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a or creature or pay 2 life. Draw two cards and mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Swarm Roach
card.text: When this creature enters, if you didn't cast it from your hand, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. {3}{B}{B}{B}: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Spine Crawler
card.text: Deathtouch, defender {1}{G}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Terran Medic
card.text: Whenever another creature enters under you control, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Reconstitution
card.text: Return up to three target creature cards with total mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Bunker Down
card.text: Up to two target creatures each get +1/+2 until end of turn. Mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Brutalisk
card.text: Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}. Trample, reach

card.name: Nerazim Stalker
card.text: Flash Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Terrazine Infiltrator
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, create a Vespene token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card, then discard a card.")

card.name: Derelict Infiltrator
card.text: Ward {1} Whenever you draw your second card each turn, tap or untap target nonland permanent.

card.name: Psionic Efficiency
card.text: Return up to one target instant card and up to one target sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Psionic Efficiency.

card.name: Caustic Baneling
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a creature dealt damage by this creature this turn dies, exile that card.

card.name: Backwater Vulture
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Frontline Combatant
card.text: Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Khala — {1}, Remove a counter from among Protoss permanents you control: Target creature gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Relentless Brood
card.text: Haste Other creatures you control have haste. Whenever a creature you control attacks, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Aspiring Ascendant
card.text: This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) When this creature enters, you may remove a counter from it. If you do, target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Dominion Ghost
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target creature. If you have one or fewer cards in hand, it deals 3 damage to target creature instead.

card.name: Snipe
card.text: Snipe deals 2 damage to any target. If you have one or fewer cards in hand, it deals 3 damage to any target instead.

card.name: Raze the Infestation
card.text: Raze the Infestation deals 3 damage to each creature, then mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Cull the Unworthy
card.text: Khala — As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may remove three counters from among Protoss permanents you control. If you do, copy it. All creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Conclave Judicator
card.text: This creature enters with a shield counter on it. Khala — Remove three counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Put a shield counter on target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Gabriel Tosh, Spectre
card.text: If you would draw a card, look at the top two cards of your library instead. Put one into your hand and exile the other one. Until end of turn, you may play cards exiled this way. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create a Vespene token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card, then discard a card.")

card.name: Prince Valerian Mengsk
card.text: Lifelink {W}, Discard a card: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under your control. {1}{R}, Discard a card: Return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Regenerative Chrysalis
card.text: Choose one — • When target creature you control dies this turn, return it to the battlefield tapped under your control. • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Daelaam Zealot
card.text: Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: The Overmind
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life Once during each of your turns, you may cast a creature spell from your graveyard. It becomes a black and green Zerg.

card.name: Endless March of the Swarm
card.text: Lands you control have "{T}: Create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens."

card.name: Swarm Broodlord
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens.

card.name: Swarm Corruptor
card.text: Flying, deathtouch {B}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target enchantment. You lose life equal to that permanent's mana value.

card.name: Hardened Carapace
card.text: Target creature you control gets +0/+3 and gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Templar's Insight
card.text: Target player draws two cards. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Psionic Consumption
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or pay {U}. Counter target spell.

card.name: Void Extractor
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, you may pay 3 life. If you do, return target creature card with converted mana cost 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. That creature can't attack or block for as long as you control Void Extractor.

card.name: Nerazim Warden
card.text: Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Rebel Goliath
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Dominion Siege Tank
card.text: Trample {8}: This creature deals 5 damage to target creature without flying.

card.name: Fighter Viking
card.text: Flying {8}: Up to three target creatures get +2/+2 and gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: Stasis Chamber
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until this artifact leaves the battlefield. Put X charge counters on this artifact where X is the mana value of the exiled card. {W}, Remove three counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Tap target creature.

card.name: Dominion Assault Trooper
card.text: When this creature enters, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Infested Fortress
card.text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player sacrifices a creature and mills a card. If the player can't, sacrifice this creature.

card.name: Nerazim Void Ray
card.text: Flying {8}: Target player loses 4 life.

card.name: Hunter Seeker Missle
card.text: Remove all counters from target creature, then Hunter Seeker Missle deals 6 damage to that creature.

card.name: Nerazim Corsair
card.text: Flying Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This enters with a shield counter on it. Khala — {U}, Remove a counter from among Protoss permanents you control: Tap target permanent.

card.name: Weave Potential
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains reach, trample, and indestructible until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Primal Ambush
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+2 until end of turn. It fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Hammer Security
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or dies, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Swarmling Pack
card.text: Create three 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. They gain haste. Sacrifice those tokens at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Primal Ravager
card.text: When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Forced Into Hiding
card.text: Target creature has base power and toughness 1/1 until end of turn, then you may remove all counters on it. Draw a card.

card.name: Raynor's Raiders
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Strike from Reality
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Exile target permanent.

card.name: Joyride
card.text: Gain control of target artifact creature or Vehicle. Untap it. It gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Daelaam Mothership
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each blue nontoken permanent you control. Flying, vigilance Other permanents you control have hexproof. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile up to two other target nonland permanents. Return those cards to the battlefield under their owner's control at the beginning of their owner's next end step.

card.name: Nerazim Tempest
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each black nontoken permanent you control. Flying, first strike Whenever a creature your opponent controls dies, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Protoss creature you control. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, destroy up to one target creature.

card.name: Gorgon Battlecruiser
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each red nontoken permanent you control. Flying, menace Whenever a creature you control attacks, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile the top three cards of your library. Until end of turn of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Rebel Command Ship
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each white nontoken permanent you control. Flying, lifelink Other creatures you control get +2/+2. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, other permanents you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Primordial Law
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Choose a creature you control. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Infusion {3}{R}{G}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Rich Mineral Field
card.text: This land enters the battlefield tapped and with two depletion counters on it. {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Remove a depletion counter from this land: Mine twice. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Scouting Zergling
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise you may put it into the graveyard. When creature dies, create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token.

card.name: Star Reader
card.text: Khala — When this enters, draw two cards, then discard a card unless you remove two counters from among Protoss permanents you control.

card.name: Scanner Sweep
card.text: Look at target player's hand and the top card of that player's library. Surveil 1, then mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Victory Rally
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. If you have one or fewer cards in hand, exile the top three cards of your library instead. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Dominator of Essence
card.text: When this creature enters, for each color, each opponent sacrifices a permanent of that color. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card for each permanent sacrificed this way.

card.name: Dominator of Form
card.text: When this creature enters, remove all counters from all permanents target player controls. When you do, gain control of target permanent with mana value X or less where X is the number of counters removed this way.

card.name: Stukov, Infested Officer
card.text: Menace Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, exile target card in that player's graveyard. {20}, {T}: Create six 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each card your opponents own in exile.

card.name: StarCraft Draft Archetypes SCDS
card.text: {W}{U} [b]DAELAAM PROTOSS COUNTERS[/b] [/b]Overwhelm your opponents with your shielded creatures and grow them with +1/+1 counters from valor {U}{B} [b][b]NERAZIM PROTOSS COUNTERS[/b][/b] Generate charge counters passively or through proliferating to power your spells and abilities {B}{R}[b][b] INFESTED ZERG GRAVE HATE[/b][/b] Consume your opponent's graveyard to massive bonuses {R}{G}[b][b] PRIMAL ZERG NONCOMBAT[/b][/b] Get rewarded for having your creatures fight and bite your opponent's away {G}{W} [b][b]RAIDERS TERRAN MINERALS[/b][/b] Ramp your way to victory as Minerals power up your spells and abilities {W}{B}[b][b] TAL'DARIM PROTOSS POWER[/b][/b] Your creatures power doesn't belong only to them. Their deaths will only be additional +1/+1s for your creatures {B}{G} [b][b]SWARM ZERG SACRIFICE[/b][/b] Go wide with 1/1 tokens then use them to power your abilities over and over again {G}{U} [b][b]SWARM ZERG EVOLUTION[/b][/b] Ramp and get bonuses for unleashing the biggest Zerg creatures upon your opponents {U}{R}[b][b] SPECTRE TERRAN VESPENE[/b][/b] Use the card draw power of Vespene to get the cards you need and to trigger your draw abilities {R}{W} [b][b]DOMINION TERRAN ‘HECKBENT'[/b][/b] When you have one or fewer cards in hand, your spells and abilities become active or get stronger

card.name: Void Pylon
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put two charge counters on this artifact. When this artifact enters, surveil 1.

card.name: Siege Line
card.text: Choose one — • Siege Line deals 3 damage to target attacking creature. • Destroy target artifact. • Exile up to two target cards from a graveyard.

card.name: Doctor Ariel Hanson
card.text: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, that many tokens plus a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token are created instead. {T}, Sacrifice a Zerg creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Gantrithor, Flagship
card.text: Flying, vigilance At the beginning of your end step, create two 1/1 colorless Protoss artifact creature tokens with flying. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may pay {X}{2}{W}{W}. If you do, exile this creature and each other nonland permanent with mana value X or more.

card.name: Consider Options
card.text: Target player draws two cards, then discards a card. Infusion {1}{U}{U}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: James Raynor, Revolutionary
card.text: Haste Other Terran creatures you control get +2/+1. Whenever a Terran creature you control attacks, create a Mineral token and a Vespene token.

card.name: Excavation Job
card.text: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may mine unless that player pays {1}. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Infested Thor
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, that player mills three cards, then exile that player's graveyard. Then if ten or more cards were exiled this way, that player loses 4 life.

card.name: Fury of the Queen
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each time it has attacked this turn. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, if it's the first combat phase of the turn, untap each attacking creature. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Devouring One
card.text: Menace, haste Whenever a creature token enters under your control, you may give it +1/+0 and haste until end of turn. If you do, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Protoss SCDS
card.text: Flying

card.name: Turbojet Jumpsuit
card.text: Equipped creature has flying and haste. Equip {1}

card.name: Terror of the Void
card.text: Protection from mana value 2 or less Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice any number of other creatures. When you do, for each creature sacrificed this way, exile target nonland permanent.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Molten Growth
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Nerazim Oracle
card.text: Flying, vigilance Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Psionic Reaver
card.text: Trample Spells you cast cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Medical Lieutenant
card.text: Flash Lifelink Whenever this creature enters or attacks, up to two other target creatures you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Sieged Liberator
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, destroy up to one target tapped nonland permanent.

card.name: Powered Combat Suit
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature attacks, mine." (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.) Equip {1}

card.name: Transformative Vikings
card.text: Flying, vigilance At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature gains your choice of +1/+1, flying, or vigilance until end of turn. If that creature is a Terran, it gets +1/+1, flying, and vigilance until end of turn instead.

card.name: Temporal Matrix
card.text: At the beginning of each upkeep, put a charge counter on this for each Protoss permanent you control. Khala — Remove one hundred counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Tap each permanent target opponent controls. They don't untap during their controller's next untap step.

card.name: Swarm Aberration
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, exile up to one target card from an opponent's graveyard. Whenever one or more cards leaves an opponent's graveyard, this creature deals 1 damage to that player.

card.name: Glory of Combat
card.text: Creature you control have valor. (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Calldown M.U.L.E.
card.text: Mine. Mine three times instead if you have one or fewer cards in hand. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Zergling Swarm
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token.

card.name: Guardian Templar
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, put a shield counter on up to two target creatures. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Earthsplitter Ordnance
card.text: Earthsplitter Ordnance deals X damage to target opponent and target creature that player controls. Infusion {X}{X}{R}{R}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Power Incarnate
card.text: Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. Then each opponent loses life equal to the highest power among creatures you control that had a +1/+1 counter put on it this way. Infusion {X}{X}{W}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Hive Queen
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature enters or attacks, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal up to two creature and/or land cards from among them and put one into your hand and the other on top of your library. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Chrono Manipulator
card.text: Valor (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Khala — At the beginning of your precombat main phase, you may remove five counters from among Protoss you control. If you do, there is an additional beginning phase after this phase. (The beginning phase includes the untap, upkeep, and draw steps, then you go to combat.)

card.name: Fracture Point
card.text: Destroy target permanent that's an artifact or enchantment. You gain 2 life for each permanent destroyed this way. Infusion {2}{G}{W}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Repurpose Biomass
card.text: Shuffle target card in your graveyard into your library. For each card shuffled into your library this way, create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token. Infusion {3}{B}{G}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its infusion cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each". Then exile it.)

card.name: Hellion Strike Team
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, this creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature defending player controls.

card.name: Ghost Recon
card.text: {3}, {T}: Discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. The first time you discard one or more cards each turn, mine. (Create a tapped Mineral or tapped Vespene artifact token.)

card.name: Terrazine Addiction
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a Vespene or pay {1}{R}. When you cast your next instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Nerazim Matriarch
card.text: At the beginning of each upkeep, put a charge counter on this creature. You may look at the top card of your library at any time. Khala — Remove X counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Reveal the top card of your library. If it's mana value is X or less, put that card into your hand. X can't be 0.

card.name: Dominion Marine
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Other Terran you control get +1+1. As long as you have one or fewer cards in hand, they get an additional +1/+0.

card.name: Shadowed Cityscape
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Tal'Darim Supplicant
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. When this creature dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Daelaam Gloryseeker
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Khala — Remove three counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dominion Marauders
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Tap target creature if it has power 2 or less or if you have one or fewer cards in your hand."

card.name: Terran Marine
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. As long as you have one or fewer cards in hand, this creature gets +1/+0 and has haste.

card.name: Zerus Primal
card.text: Whenever this creature deals noncombat damage, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Broodmother Queen
card.text: Reach At the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile three cards from your graveyard. If you do, create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens.

card.name: Zagara, Swarm Inheritor
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice another creature. If it was a nontoken creature, surveil 1, then draw a card. Otherwise each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Tremble Before Greatness
card.text: Target creature you don't control gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Nerazim Voidhunters
card.text: Khala — Remove three counters from among Protoss permanents you control: Each opponent loses 1 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Brood Zergling
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token.

card.name: Plated Ultralisk
card.text: Ward {2}

card.name: War Pigs
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, if mana from a Mineral was spent to cast it, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Warrior's Creed
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, put a shield counter on enchanted creature. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 as long as it has a counter on it.

card.name: Infestation Process
card.text: {1}{B}: Exile target card from an opponent's graveyard. If it is a creature card, create a 1/1 black and green Zerg creature token. Otherwise each opponent loses 1 life. {B}, Sacrifice a creature: Target player mills three cards.

card.name: Swarm Command
card.text: Choose two — • Create two 1/1 black and green Zerg creature tokens. • Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn. • Mill three cards, then return a land card from your graveyard to your hand. • Permanents you control gain hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Dominion Command
card.text: Choose two — • Up to two target creatures get +1/+0 until end of turn. • Dominion Command deals 2 damage to target creature. • Target player may sacrifice an artifact. If they do, that player draws two cards. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Diabolic Command
card.text: Choose two — • Remove up to three counters from target permanent. • Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. • Target player may draw a card. If they do, they lose 3 life. • Target opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Analytical Command
card.text: Choose two — • Counter target noncreature spell with mana value X or less. • Target creature gets -X/-0 until end of turn. • Untap up to X target nonland permanents. • Target player may discard up to X cards. If they do, they draw a card for each card discarded this way.

card.name: Rebel Command
card.text: Choose two — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. • Tap target creature. • The next time noncombat damage would be dealt to target creature or player this turn, prevent that damage. • Target player gains 3 life.

card.name: Terrazine Infusion
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create two Vespene tokens. (They are artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card, then discard a card.") Activated abilities of tokens you control cost {1} less to activate.

card.name: Rogue Spectre
card.text: Ward {1} Whenever you draw your second card each turn, tap up to one target creature and this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.
